site.name: JSON Explorer Pro
site.description: Explore, analyse, diff, transform and visualise JSON instantly — all in your browser, no data leaves your machine.

hero.heading: JSON Explorer Pro
hero.description: Parse, explore, diff, transform and visualise JSON instantly. Everything runs in your browser — your data never leaves your machine.

author.name: Ian Tweedie
author.role: Microsoft MVP | Power Platform Architect | Developer
author.bio: Ian Tweedie is a Microsoft MVP and Power Platform architect at Tweed.technology. He creates free developer tools through Mightora and shares knowledge via the TechTweedie blog and YouTube channel.

metadata.ogTitle: JSON Explorer Pro — Browser-based JSON Workspace
metadata.ogDescription: Explore, diff, transform and visualise JSON instantly. All processing in your browser. No uploads.
metadata.keywords: JSON, JSON explorer, JSON formatter, JSON diff, JSON visualiser, JSON tools, developer tools
